biography: A familiar face at the Hector Trophée, Joakim is known for his calm demeanor on the course. While he has only participated in the event once, his presence is always felt, and his insights are valued by fellow competitors. Off the course, Joakim is known to be a keen strategist, often seen analyzing gameplays and predicting outcomes with uncanny accuracy.

Though Joakim has not yet claimed a Victor trophy or a Hector Trophée, his dedication to the sport is undeniable. His focus and commitment make him a formidable player, even if he is now considered retired from the competition. His fans remain hopeful for a potential return in the future, although he is not scheduled to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026.
